calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-09-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Richard Losch, Esq. appearing for Appellant Terence Cowhey, who is also present
Richard A. Rigg, Respondent with his witness Eric Van Oppen

This cause comes on regularly for Trial de Novo as to the Denial of Defendant's Motion to Vacate Judgment of June 27, 2018

All parties and witnesses are sworn

The Court poses questions to the plaintiff/respondent
Richard A. Rigg testifies on his own behalf.
The following exhibit No. 1, is marked and identifed (copy of invoices)
The following exhibit No. 2, is marked and identifed (minutes 2001 Sacramento dated 11/21/17)
The following exhibit No. 3, is marked and identifed (letter to Cowhey dated 3/21/18)
The following exhibit No. 4 is marked and identified (group of ten photos)

The Court poses questions to plaintiff/respondent's witness.
Eric Van Oppen testifies on behalf of Respondent / Plaintiff

The Court poses questions to appellant / defendant
Terence Cowhey testifies on his own behalf.
Richard Losch testifies on behalf of Appellant/ Defendant

The Court poses questionss to both sides

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

The Court will return all exhibits upon ruling

Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: R. Goulding; Not Reported (502)
